items.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: A sell-off in tech names pulled the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite to a losing session on Tuesday. The Dow, which briefly touched a fresh high, also closed lower.

items.title: S&P 500 falls for a second day after AMD earnings, weak jobs data: Live updates
items.description: Tech put on the worst performance of the 11 sectors in the S&P 500, falling more than 2% on Tuesday.

items.title: ACI Wins Multi-Year Caterpillar Engagement as Strategic Technology Transformation Partner
items.description: ACI, a global provider of enterprise-grade technology services, today announced it has entered into a multi-year, strategic partnership with Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT). ACI will lead a comprehensive modernization initiative focused on mission-critical applications across Caterpillar's dealer network.

items.title: Baird Highlights Backlog Strength and Earnings Visibility at Caterpillar (CAT)
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is included among the Dividend Growth Stocks: 25 Aristocrats. On January 30, Baird raised its price target on Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) to $805 from $680 and maintained an Outperform rating. The firm updated its model after reviewing fourth-quarter results that pointed to a large backlog, solid earnings visibility, and returns on invested […]

items.title: What's Going On With Caterpillar Stock Today?
items.description: Caterpillar shares ticked higher in Tuesday's premarket after multiple analysts raised price targets following the company's late-January earnings beat.
